tests.description: Assert the SQL workflow substrate and core operators are seeded.
tests.name: core_catalog_shape
tests.sql:
DO $$
DECLARE
    missing text[];
BEGIN
    IF to_regprocedure('rvbbit.flow(text)') IS NULL THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'rvbbit.flow(text) is not registered';
    END IF;

    SELECT array_agg(expected.name ORDER BY expected.name)
    INTO missing
    FROM (VALUES
        ('clean_year'),
        ('redact'),
        ('headline'),
        ('analyze'),
        ('pivot'),
        ('group'),
        ('top'),
        ('filter'),
        ('normalize'),
        ('metric_card'),
        ('line_chart'),
        ('filter_control'),
        ('layout_grid')
    ) AS expected(name)
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM rvbbit.operators op
        WHERE op.name = expected.name
    );

    IF missing IS NOT NULL THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'missing seeded rvbbit operators: %', missing;
    END IF;
END
$$;

tests.description: Exercise visual/control/action rowset operators and validate artifact shape.
tests.name: visual_artifact_operators

tests.description: Exercise tile naming, filter binding, and dashboard layout metadata operators.
tests.name: workflow_layout_bindings
tests.sql:
DO $$
DECLARE
    renderers text[];
    v jsonb;
BEGIN
    SELECT array_agg(value->>'renderer' ORDER BY value->>'renderer')
    INTO renderers
    FROM rvbbit.flow($q$
        select * from (values ('Todo', 2), ('Done', 5)) v(status, n)
        then bar_chart(x => 'status', y => 'n', title => 'Issues')
        then tile_name(name => 'issues')
    $q$);
    IF renderers IS DISTINCT FROM ARRAY['statement_name','vega_lite']::text[] THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'tile_name emitted unexpected renderers: %', renderers;
    END IF;

    SELECT value
    INTO v
    FROM rvbbit.flow($q$
        select * from (values ('Todo'), ('Done')) v(status)
        then filter_control(field => 'status', kind => 'dropdown', title => 'Status')
        then tile_name(name => 'filters')
        then bind_filter(target => 'issues', field => 'status')
    $q$)
    WHERE value->>'renderer' = 'filter_binding';
    IF v #>> '{spec,target}' IS DISTINCT FROM 'issues'
       OR v #>> '{spec,field}' IS DISTINCT FROM 'status' THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'bind_filter emitted unexpected binding: %', v;
    END IF;

    SELECT value
    INTO v
    FROM rvbbit.flow($q$
        select 1 as layout_marker
        then layout_grid(rows => '[["filters"],[{"name":"issues","w":2}]]', mode => 'arrange', title => 'Dashboard')
    $q$);
    IF v->>'renderer' IS DISTINCT FROM 'statement_layout'
       OR v #>> '{spec,mode}' IS DISTINCT FROM 'arrange'
       OR (v #>> '{spec,rows,1,0,w}')::int IS DISTINCT FROM 2 THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'layout_grid emitted unexpected layout: %', v;
    END IF;
END
$$;
